name: faast-marketplace
description: FAAST team plugins and agents for Claude Code - backend architecture, code review, and financial SaaS tooling

plugins.name: senior-backend-architect

plugins.name: microservices-agents
plugins.description: Sistema de agentes IA para arquitectura de microservicios reales. 7 agentes (Arquitecto, Lead, Backend, Frontend, DBA, Infra, Ciberseguridad) + 10 skills para crear y gestionar proyectos multi-repo.
